name: Lucky
description: Lucky is is an older looking Exceed and Marl's husband. Lucky is a very loud and aggressive person. Upon meeting Happy, he began to swing his gardening tool at him. However, his wife Marl states that despite his rough exterior he shares the same beliefs as her.   ~!He is actually Happy's real father. Years ago, Queen Shagotte ordered that Lucky's child, Happy, be taken away and sent to Earth Land along with many other Exceed children in order to assassinate the Dragon Slayers, and because of that, he and his wife Marl opposed the mission as well as the queen, resulting in their exile from the kingdom.!~
